name: Robin • Summeretto
desc: Soaring clearest skies and bluest oceans, wings sweep up the sea spray, transforming it into a new melody.\nFollowing the lingering echoes of memory, she embraces the unexpected along the way, seeking inspiration for a melodic variation—\nBeyond the melody, how else can the Harmony sing?

1.name: Stray Birds of Summer
1.desc: Robin • Summeretto's Max Vibes increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. The first time an ally target uses a Skill that causes Robin • Summeretto to gain Vibes each turn, she gains an additional <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> points.

2.name: Heart Like Still Waters
2.desc: "Summer Songbirds" records <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of the non-<u>True DMG</u> dealt by ally targets. When using the Memosprite Skill, it additionally deals True DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the total DMG plus current Vibes stacks × <unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak> to the enemy target with the highest HP, then clears <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of the recorded value.

10000017.name: True DMG
10000017.desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as launching 1 attack.

3.name: Gleanings of Lost Echoes
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Hearing the Chord Variations
4.desc: Upon entering the "Fever" state, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Vibes, and the SPD of "Summer Songbirds" increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> plus current Vibes × <unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Together, Toward a New Dawn
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: To Sing an Aria Untitled
6.desc: Ally targets' All-Type RES PEN increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. The Memosprite Skill's DMG multiplier increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the original multiplier. When entering the "Fever" state, CRIT DMG for Robin • Summeretto and "Summer Songbirds" increases by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

151201.name: Soundwaves, Tuning the Ocean Breeze
151201.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Robin • Summeretto's Max HP to one enemy.
151201.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy.

151202.name: Midsummer Is the Musician of the Soul
151202.desc: <u>Summons the memosprite</u> "Summer Songbirds" Bessie. If "Summer Songbirds" is already on the field, restores its HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of "Summer Songbirds's" Max HP, and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Vibes.
151202.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons memosprite</u></color> "Summer Songbirds" Bessie. If "Summer Songbirds" is already on the field, restores HP for "Summer Songbirds" and gains <color=#f29e38ff>Vibes</color>.

10000018.name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

151203.name: Leap into the Ocean Blue Rhapsody
151203.desc: Advances the action of one designated ally unit (excluding Robin • Summeretto) by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and regenerates a fixed amount of Energy equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of their Max Energy. Then, this character gains the "Special Guest" effect. After the character with "Special Guest" attacks, Robin additionally gains 1 point of Vibes. This character and her memosprite cannot advance the actions of other targets. This effect lasts for 2 turn(s), and its duration decreases by 1 at the start of this character's turn.
151203.simple_desc: Advances the action of one designated ally character and regenerates Energy, then grants this character the "Special Guest" effect. After this character attacks, additionally grants Robin 1 point of Vibes.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

151204.name: Cruising the Boundless Skies
151204.desc: The memosprite "Summer Songbirds" has an initial Max HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Robin • Summeretto's Max HP and an initial SPD equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Robin • Summeretto's SPD. When an ally target uses an attack, or when providing healing effect or Shield for the first time in any target's turn, Robin • Summeretto gains 1 Vibes, up to a max of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>. While "Summer Songbirds" Bessie is on the field, if Robin's Vibes is <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> or more, immediately summons the "Summer Songbird" Drummie, and if Vibes is <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> or more, immediately summons the "Summer Songbird" Paddie. When all "Summer Songbirds" take the stage, dispels all <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> that Robin • Summeretto and the "Summer Songbirds" are under, enter the "Fever" state and deploy a Zone. When ally targets deal DMG inside the Zone, they ignore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[f1]%</unbreak></color> plus Vibes × <unbreak>#9[f1]%</unbreak> of enemy targets' DEF.\nWhile in the Fever state, Robin • Summeretto and the "Summer Songbirds" are immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>, and Robin • Summeretto will not enter her turns or take action until the "Fever" state ends.
151204.simple_desc: After an ally target uses an attack, provides healing, or provides a Shield, Robin • Summeretto gains Vibes. When all "Summer Songbirds" take the stage, Robin • Summeretto and the "Summer Songbirds" enter the "Fever" state and deploy a Zone. While inside the Zone, when ally targets deal DMG, they ignore the enemy target's DEF.\nWhile in the "Fever" state, Robin • Summeretto and the "Summer Songbirds" are immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>, and Robin • Summeretto will not enter her turn and cannot take action before the "Fever" state ends.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

151206.name: Attack
151206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

151207.name: We Form A Melody
151207.desc: After using Technique, at the start of the next combat, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Vibes, and grants all allies a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> DMG Boost for 2 turn(s).
151207.simple_desc: Upon entering battle, immediately gains Vibes and increases DMG dealt by all allies.

1.point_desc: When an ally target causes Robin • Summeretto to gain Vibes, if their ATK is higher than Robin • Summeretto's, increases that target's ATK by an amount equal to (<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> + Vibes × <unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak>) of Robin • Summeretto's Max HP. Otherwise, increases that target's CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> + Vibes × <unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak>. Lasts for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

When Robin • Summeretto or "Summer Songbirds" receive healing or a Shield provided by teammates, they gain <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Groove," up to a max of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> stack(s). The first time Robin • Summeretto gains Vibes each turn, if she has "Groove," she consumes 1 stack of "Groove" and regenerates a fixed amount of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy.
Increases the CRIT Rate of Robin • Summeretto and "Summer Songbirds" by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

1151201.name: Twittering Quartet
1151201.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Summer Songbirds' Max HP to all enemies.
1151201.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to all enemies.

1151203.name: Fluttering Harmony
1151203.desc: While in the "Fever" state, Summer Songbirds and a countdown will appear on the action bar, increasing the DMG dealt by Robin • Summeretto and themselves by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> + Vibes × <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>. When Summer Songbirds' turn starts, they use the Memosprite Skill. The countdown has an initial SPD of <unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak>. When their turn starts, <unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak> of current Vibes (a minimum of <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> points) gets deducted. When Vibes reach 0, the Summer Songbirds disappear and Robin • Summeretto exits the "Fever" state. While Summer Songbirds are on the field, increases the DMG taken by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[f1]%</unbreak></color> respectively based on the number of members present.
1151203.simple_desc: While in the "Fever" state, DMG dealt by Robin • Summeretto and this unit increases. Summer Songbirds use Memosprite Skill at the start of their turn. When Vibes reach 0, Summer Songbirds disappear, causing Robin • Summeretto to exit the "Fever" state. While Summer Songbirds are on the field, increases DMG taken by all enemies based on the number of members.

1151205.name: Nestle in the Heartbeat of the Sea
1151205.desc: When Summer Songbirds are summoned, regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy for Robin • Summeretto.
1151205.simple_desc: When summoned, regenerates Energy for Robin • Summeretto.

1151206.name: Ride the Summer Night Breeze
1151206.desc: When Summer Songbirds disappear, Robin • Summeretto's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.
